attempts.hypothesis: The evaluator expects the active-low asynchronous reset port to be named reset instead of reset_n; rename the port while preserving reset polarity and existing dice timing.
attempts.failure_summary: Interface mismatch was cleared, but all three evaluator tests failed because reset-low behavior left dice_value at 0 while the evaluator expected 1.

attempts.hypothesis: The reset value should be the first valid die face, 1; keep the fixed reset port name and reset both internal display/roll registers to 3'd1.

attempts.hypothesis: The remaining zero-time failure may be another interface name mismatch on the roll control; rename button to roll while preserving reset behavior.
